creator: jon.passki@hursk.com
text:
Per an email sent to ports@ [1], based on the findings from fenner [2], the MASTER_SITES Makefile for security/unicornscan has been updated [3].  Just need a committer to commit the change.

Cheers,

Jon

[1] http://docs.freebsd.org/cgi/getmsg.cgi?fetch=667768+0+archive/2007/freebsd-ports/20070610.freebsd-ports
[2] http://people.freebsd.org/~fenner/portsurvey/cykyc@yahoo.com.html
[3] http://www.visi.com/~jpasski/ports/unicornscan/Makefile.patch
